name: GIVE ME IDEAS!!
description:
Hi hello, I'm Odiphera (one of many names to be honest </3)

I'm not the best with requests, so this is just for kinda like... comment a character you would like to see as a bot and I'll look back here anytime I wanna make a bot

I'd love to do any Forsaken, Phighting, or Roblox ARG/myth related bots if any of those sound interesting to you guys

If you do have a bot request please just put it in the comments! Chatting with this bot is useless, but go off ig if you wanna do it

I also have a strawpage you can also request bots on - Go visit it, go go go!!! https://vempuss.straw.page

Thank you!
creator: Odiphera!:3
